name: Kaimei Electronic Corp.
summary: Kaimei Electronic Corp. manufactures and sells capacitors and motor fans. Its products include conductive polymer aluminum solid, conductive polymer hybrid, and aluminum electrolytic capacitors; and DC fans, DC blowers, AC fans, and accessories. The company sells its products in approximately 60 countries worldwide. Kaimei Electronic Corp. was founded in 1978 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
